description: Parameters that must NOT be auto-tuned. Safety constraints and sentinel values.

params.name: empty_bench_loss_penalty
params.reason: Safety: prevents instant loss from empty bench

params.name: winning_attack_boost
params.reason: Safety: ensures winning attacks are always taken

params.name: avoid_retreat_when_winning
params.reason: Safety: prevents retreating when attack wins

params.name: avoid_end_when_winning
params.reason: Safety: prevents ending when attack wins

params.name: avoid_end_with_attack
params.reason: Core rule: never end turn when attack available

params.name: avoid_retreat_with_attack
params.reason: Core rule: never retreat when attack available (except final prize)

params.name: deck_out_loss
params.reason: Safety: deck-out detection must remain strong

params.name: resistance_value
params.reason: TCG rule: resistance always reduces by 30

params.name: sentinel_return_0
params.reason: Sentinel: no-op return in many functions

params.name: voltorb_damage_formula_base
params.reason: Card text: fixed damage formula component

params.name: voltorb_damage_formula_scale
params.reason: Card text: fixed damage formula component
